profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update how you appear to others in meetings and chats.
profile.image-description: Optional. A square image works best.
profile.personal-description: Your display name, email, and bio.
profile.password-description: Change the password used to sign in.
profile.email-hint: Used for sign-in. Email changes aren't available yet.

avatar.helper: PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF. Up to 5 MB. Square images look best.

password.info: Changing your password signs you out everywhere.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Defaults for meetings, what others can see, and your language.
settings.appearance-description: Theme and brand accent for this device.
settings.localization-description: Used for meeting times, dates, and the UI language.
settings.defaults-description: What happens when you start or join a meeting.
settings.composer-description: Choose how the chat message box behaves.
settings.privacy-description: Control what others see and how your data is used.

preferences.mic-muted-description: Start every meeting with your microphone off.
preferences.camera-off-description: Keep your camera off until you turn it on.
preferences.default-view-description: Gallery shows everyone; speaker focuses the active talker.
preferences.sounds-description: Chimes on join, leave, chat, reactions, and knocks.
preferences.notifications-description: Get notified about chat and admit requests when this tab isn't focused.
preferences.visibility-description: Who can see your profile outside of meetings.
preferences.show-email-description: Let people in your meetings see your email address.
preferences.direct-messages-description: Let others start a 1-1 chat with you outside of meetings.
preferences.usage-data-description: Helps us improve Open Meet. No meeting content is ever shared.

appearance.accent-hint: Color used for buttons, links, and the focus ring.

composer.mode-description: Pick the chat message editor you prefer.

toast.notifications-unsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser
toast.notifications-denied: Permission denied - enable notifications in your browser settings

validation.avatar-invalid-type: Avatar must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF image
validation.password-same: New password must differ from the current one
